creator: kzentner@u.washington.edu
text:
Update port to most recent version: 0.6.2
	Files changed: Makefile
	  	       distinfo
		       files/* (not diff'ed)

soundcard.h is now in /usr/include/sys so many of the patches were
deleted. As a result the new patches are included instead of their diffs
to the old ones.
